import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Reprocess a closed window"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/windows/{instanceId}/reprocess"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Re-runs all actions for a `CLOSED` window. Useful for reprocessing after
fixing a downstream system outage or a misconfigured FileSpec.
Creates a new `WindowInstance` linked to the original for audit continuity.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
